description: REV17 Stage-P scope freeze (rev 4). Stage P may modify ONLY the allowed production / release paths below. The acceptance gates, seeds, gate-seed map, fixtures, mutation audit and self-check are FROZEN and NOT editable in Stage P (the authoritative frozen-file list + hashes are in acceptance/frozen_paths_REV17.json and external_hashes_REV17.txt). Any expansion requires STOP and a Stage-F amendment.
frozen_not_editable_in_stage_p: see acceptance/frozen_paths_REV17.json#frozen_not_editable_in_stage_p (every acceptance/* gate, seed, map, fixture, mutation audit + self-check; only acceptance/production_calculation_ownership.json is writable by Stage P)

stage_p_obligations.gem_report_data.py / gem_report_draft/_h: stamp every sized row with the full identity (data-hand-id, data-ledger-index, data-player-id, data-action-kind, data-sizing-source=canonical_replay, data-physical-bb, data-live-total-bb, data-uncalled-return-bb) AND one explicitly-marked non-hidden primary display element (data-sizing-role="primary") whose amount follows the action-kind rule (call/bet/jam->physical, raise->total-to); a secondary value uses data-sizing-role="secondary"
stage_p_obligations.acceptance_invocation: invoke the row-bound + zero-fallback gates with the SHIPPED report HTML (not a synthetic list), a STRICT complete canonical record list, and an INDEPENDENT source-derived expected_sized_action_keys; require source==canonical==rendered; run a browser/DOM computed-visibility acceptance over the actual rendered DOM
stage_p_obligations.gem_decision_snapshot.py + _qa_ledger_or: remove dead_blind from the live-post tuple (explicit_unknown / dead: reduces stack + pot, never live); invoke the dead-blind gate with the MANDATORY expected_dead_blind_keys identity set derived from an independent source scan (and ship the source-scan proof the pilot set is empty)
stage_p_obligations.acceptance/production_calculation_owners: tracked contract; add to _build_bundle + verify_release so the clean-room run fails when absent
stage_p_obligations.do_not_change: the accepted full-history replay values for ordinary ante/SB/BB actions, unless a frozen golden fails
